display_text: Great Healing Lotus, Cost: 0: A non-purchasable item that instantly restores 400 health and 400 mana to you or a nearby allied hero. Can be used while controlling an allied unit. Stats: Heal/MP: 400, CD: 5s, Charges: 1.

display_text: Great Healing Lotus, Cost: 0: Provides massive instant sustain in a single use, efficient for heroes who need both health and mana to function. Key for mana-intensive heroes who also need HP, or as a reliable source of emergency recovery for your entire team. Stats: Heal/MP: 400.
